_comment: Argent local model catalog override. TEMPORARY: drops when pi-ai (currently @earendil-works/pi-ai 0.70.2) ships gpt-5.5-chat-latest natively. Tracking via earendil-works/pi#4275 + the matching upstream PR. See argent-models-override.ts for the loader bridge that merges these entries into the per-agent models.json that pi-coding-agent's ModelRegistry consumes. Pricing here mirrors gpt-5.3-chat-latest from pi-ai's catalog because OpenAI hasn't published per-token rates for the gpt-5.5-instant alias as of 2026-05-07 — see PR body for the verification follow-up.
